product.title: COVERGIRL Clean Fresh Blurring Skin Tint with SPF 30, 420 Light/Medium Neutral, Liquid Foundation, Soft Matte Finish, Smooths, Brightens, Blurs Pores, Mineral Sunscreen, Vegan Formula
featureBullets: A weightless liquid foundation with a soft matte finish that smooths and blurs the appearance of pores
Infused with 2% Niacinamide, Licorice Root Extract and Bamboo Extract, this COVERGIRL foundation hydrates skin for up to 24 hours
Provides buildable coverage without making acne worse or clogging pores while fading the appearance of post-acne marks
Contains Broad Spectrum SPF 30 Mineral Sunscreen protects skin against harmful UVA/UVB rays
Dermatologically tested, clean vegan formula suitable for all skin types including oily and acne-prone. Formulated without Parabens, Sulfates, Phthalates & Mineral Oil
product.description: Get a weightless instant blur with COVERGIRL Clean Fresh Blurring Skin Tint. Formulated with Broad Spectrum SPF 30 Mineral Sunscreen, this COVERGIRL foundation protects against UVA/UVB rays while blurring the appearance of pores and smoothing skin for all-day wear. Available in 14 adaptable shades *Based on a consumer study of 71 women after one week of use: • 94% say goes on smoothly • 92% say blends easily • 91% say is extremely comfortable • 89% say controls shine all day • 89% say more comfortable than traditional matte formulas • 88% say provides a skin-like finish

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation provides good coverage, with one noting it works well for neutral skin, and appreciate its weightless feel. The color receives mixed feedback - while some say it looks good on the skin, others find the shade slightly yellow. The finish and moisturizing properties also get mixed reviews, with one customer describing it as a beautiful soft matte finish while another finds it too matte to powder. The overall quality receives mixed opinions from customers.

reviews.reviewTitle: Covers well but light and breathable!
reviews.reviewText: Love this so much! I have older skin at 58 and I was shocked at how well this looks on my skin. Blurs and covers gently - not harsh or thick at all. I had to buy 2 different colors to mix as the light was too light but medium light was too dark but just 2 drops of each covers my whole face well. I was using Mary Kay BB cream but got tired but having to rely on my rep and pay $21 so I was thrilled to find this works as well if not better.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 8, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Excellent coverage for being a skin tint. Great oil control. I combined this with a mineral powder spf, and the combo is literally the only thing in my entire like to keep my super oily skin shine free! When I want to be put together but know I'm going to be outside and active all day, I wear this instead of true foundation and its perfect. Or if I just don't want the feeling of waering sunscreen on my face sor the feeling of liquid foundation, this avoids that heavy feeling you can get from both.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 10, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Why did you pick this product vs others?: I love that it’s mineral sunscreen! A little thick and matte, but it’s ok.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 27, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I was excited to try this. Gotta say, big disappointment. My face was well moisturized. Settled right into every pore and line. I’m 43. Not the low coat solution I was hoping for. On the plus side the color was good!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 14, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I love it! Its light and works well on my skin, the light/medium is perfect, once you add ur blush a bit of bronzer or glow, it just looks flawless all day! Ordering a few more for backup!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 11, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Awful, looks like dried toothpaste on your face. It blurs nothing. Returning it.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 20, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Amazing coverage, lightweight, blurring and a great price!
reviews.reviewText: I'm so glad I came across this on tiktok and it did not disappoint! I have oily acne prone skin with a lot of hyperpigmentation and this skin tint covers it all so well without feeling cakey or heavy which is a problem I have with other full coverage foundations. You can apply a smaller amount for a lighter coverage or build it up. It's so lightweight and has a beautiful soft matte finish that doesn't feel to dry on the face and does provide some blurring effect. The only con I can think of is that the shade range isn't the best but I have the privilege of not having to run into that issue with this skin tint. I chose shade 420, it's not too yellow but just perfect. If you're curious about this tint I would highly recommend!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 12, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Slightly yellow for a neutral shade, but still pretty close match. The finish is much more matte than I was expecting, but not drying. The texture is almost mousse-like & blends fairly easily, but I wouldn't recommend layering this product over itself. Not that you would really need to as it offers a lot of coverage. It does transfer, so you can powder if you like, but I personally feel it's too matte to powder, unless it's layered over a dewy base/primer.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 2, 2025
